overall.description: Cinematic nighttime aerial view of a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis from Cyberpunk 2077, showcasing towering skyscrapers adorned with vibrant holographic advertisements and neon lighting. The camera performs a slow panoramic sweep across the dense urban skyline, revealing intricate architectural details and atmospheric steam rising between buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-rise rooftop overlook of neon commercial district

agents.ego_description: stationary panoramic observation of the cyberpunk cityscape from an elevated aerial vantage point

entered.detail: tallest skyscraper with vertical cyan and red neon light strips and holographic projections
cluster of buildings with prominent red circular neon signage and warm lighting
large distinctive red circular illuminated advertisement on building facade
suspended holographic billboards and digital projections floating between buildings
elevated highway or monorail structure running through the city center

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sweeping view of a futuristic cyberpunk city center at night, dominated by a massive central tower covered in vertical neon lights. To the left, a dense cluster of buildings displays warm red neon signage, while holographic advertisements float in the air between structures. The camera remains stationary, slowly beginning a pan to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition to upscale residential tower overlook

events.description: camera pan reveals rooftop palm trees and residential balcony structures on the right-side building

agents.ego_description: continuing panoramic observation as the view shifts toward the right-side residential complex

entered.detail: modern glass and concrete residential tower with illuminated balconies and geometric architecture
silhouetted palm trees on the rooftop of the residential building against the night sky
mechanical structures and possible landing pads on the building roof
transparent glass balcony railings with green interior lighting visible

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues its slow pan right, the left-side neon district exits the frame while a modern glass residential tower comes into prominence on the right. Palm trees atop the residential building become visible against the night sky, and the central holographic tower shifts to the left side of the frame. Atmospheric steam rises between the buildings, adding depth to the layered cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow panoramic sweep across a futuristic cyberpunk city center, shifting from a district of dense neon signage toward a modern residential skyline. It begins with a view of a massive central tower draped in vertical neon lights, flanked by a cluster of buildings glowing with warm red signage and floating holographic advertisements. As the camera pans steadily to the right, the red-lit district exits the frame, causing the central holographic tower to shift toward the left. The scene then opens up to reveal a sleek glass residential tower topped with palm trees against the night sky. Finally, the movement emphasizes the depth of the layered cityscape as atmospheric steam rises between the towering structures.
